providers.name: Google Vertex AI
providers.note: region is in the host: <region>-aiplatform.googleapis.com (or aiplatform.<us|eu>.rep...); the global endpoint carries no region

providers.name: Azure OpenAI
providers.note: regional hosts (<region>.api.cognitive.microsoft.com, *.<region>.inference.ai.azure.com) resolve; the standard openai.azure.com does not carry a region

providers.name: AWS Bedrock
providers.note: region is in the host: bedrock-runtime.<region>.amazonaws.com
providers.sovereignty_override_note: China regions (cn-north-*, cn-northwest-*) resolve to jurisdiction cn and are operated by Sinnet/NWCD under PRC law — ring-fenced from the global AWS corporate structure for compelled-disclosure purposes

providers.name: FriendliAI
providers.note: multi-cloud, multi-region by design; serverless region not fixed or documented (HQ US + South Korea)

providers.name: Databricks
providers.note: model-serving region = the workspace's cloud region; not resolvable from the host

providers.name: Zhipu GLM / Z.ai
providers.note: api.z.ai is the international Zhipu endpoint; its cloud API is subject to Chinese law

providers.name: Volcengine Ark (Doubao)
providers.note: ByteDance; host carries the region, e.g. ark.cn-beijing.volces.com

providers.name: MiniMax
providers.note: api.minimaxi.com = China; api.minimax.io = international, data location undocumented

providers.name: GigaChat (Sber)
providers.note: hosted on Sberbank infrastructure in Russia

providers.name: Sarvam AI
providers.note: India sovereign AI; data residency in India

providers.name: Scaleway Generative APIs
providers.note: hosted in Paris, France (OPCORE)

providers.name: OVHcloud AI Endpoints
providers.note: EU/France-hosted; GDPR

providers.name: Nebius AI Studio
providers.note: EU (Finland/France) or US data centers, chosen per deployment; not in the host

providers.name: Novita AI
providers.note: global multi-region infrastructure; HQ US + Singapore entity

providers.name: NVIDIA NIM
providers.note: hosted catalog = US DGX Cloud; NIM is often self-hosted (default unknown)

providers.name: Ollama (local)
providers.note: local-first inference server (localhost by default)

providers.name: Snowflake Cortex
providers.note: region is per-account; host does not carry it

providers.name: Lemonade (AMD, local)
providers.note: local-first inference server (localhost by default)

providers.name: Microsoft Edge TTS
providers.note: free Edge browser TTS endpoint; serving region undocumented

providers.name: Whisper (local)
providers.note: local-first STT runtimes (faster-whisper/CTranslate2, openai-whisper)

providers.name: Transformers (local)
providers.note: local-first inference runtimes (HF transformers, sentence-transformers); multi-model — provenance from bound model references

providers.name: Pinecone
providers.note: vector cluster region is chosen per index; not resolvable from the host

providers.name: Weaviate Cloud
providers.note: cluster region chosen at creation; SDK may also target a self-hosted instance

providers.name: Qdrant Cloud
providers.note: cluster region chosen at creation; SDK may also target a self-hosted instance

providers.name: Zilliz / Milvus
providers.note: Zilliz Cloud cluster region chosen at creation; pymilvus may also target self-hosted Milvus

providers.name: Local inference
providers.note: loopback / on-host inference; not a cross-border transfer

providers.name: Custom / OpenAI-compatible endpoint
providers.note: host not in the KB; assert its jurisdiction via --providers

providers.name: Model reference (no provider in file)
providers.note: a model identifier with no attributable provider flow in its file; a weights-provenance signal, not a network flow

providers.name: LiteLLM (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: LangChain (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: LlamaIndex (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: LangChain4j (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router for the JVM; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: Spring AI (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router for the JVM; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: aisuite (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: Vercel AI SDK (router)
providers.note: provider-agnostic core; the @ai-sdk/<provider> adapter package determines the provider

providers.name: OpenRouter (router)
providers.note: multi-provider router; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: Vercel AI Gateway (router)
providers.note: router/gateway; destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: Black Forest Labs
providers.note: Freiburg, Germany; api.bfl.ai is global, api.us/eu.bfl.ai are regional

providers.name: Recraft
providers.note: image generation; SF (some legacy London refs)

providers.name: Inception Labs
providers.note: Mercury diffusion LLM

providers.name: Jina AI
providers.note: Berlin HQ; R&D also in China

providers.name: Voyage AI
providers.note: embeddings/rerank (MongoDB)

providers.name: GitHub Models / Copilot
providers.note: Microsoft/GitHub

providers.name: GMI Cloud
providers.note: Mountain View HQ; multi-region DCs

providers.name: DigitalOcean Gradient
providers.note: serverless + agents inference (inference.do-ai.run)

providers.name: IBM watsonx.ai
providers.note: region in host (<region>.ml.cloud.ibm.com); not resolved -> unknown

providers.name: Oracle OCI Generative AI
providers.note: region in host (inference.generativeai.<region>.oci.oraclecloud.com); not resolved -> unknown

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
providers.note: edge inference; location varies

providers.name: Heroku Managed Inference
providers.note: us/eu regional endpoints (Salesforce)

providers.name: Nscale
providers.note: UK entity, inference in Norway/EU; not resolvable -> unknown

providers.name: LibertAI
providers.note: decentralized (Aleph); no single jurisdiction

providers.name: Public AI
providers.note: compute pooled across partners/jurisdictions (Apertus)

providers.name: AI/ML API (router)
providers.note: multi-model router (Estonia HQ); destination chosen at runtime

providers.name: Amazon Polly
providers.note: region in host: polly.<region>.amazonaws.com
